_doc: Anchor #1: Rook in his default mood (content), zero memories. Probes the LLM's baseline drift voice — no recent context to lean on, just character + mood. The cleanest 'cold start' of drift narrate output.
name: rook_content_empty
npc_seed: the forge-keeper; slow-moving and quiet; hums old songs while working the bellows, sleeves always a little sooty
